user.title: REQNET Recuperator
user.description: Enter the IP address of your REQNET recuperator device.

update_method.title: Update method
update_method.description: Your Home Assistant has an MQTT broker configured. MQTT provides instant state updates. Polling checks the device on a fixed interval.

mqtt_broker.title: MQTT broker
mqtt_broker.description: Enter your Home Assistant MQTT broker details. The device will be configured to publish state updates to this broker.

poll_interval.title: Polling interval
poll_interval.description: How often to query the device for state updates.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device. Check the IP address and that the device is reachable.
error.mqtt_configure_failed: Failed to configure MQTT broker on the device. You can retry or fall back to polling.
